name: diagnose
description: Disciplined diagnosis of a hard bug or performance regression: reproduce → minimize → hypothesize → instrument → fix root cause → regression-test. Workflow loop — run natively; the value is evidence-driven discipline that refuses guess-fixing.
rubric: The failure is reproduced deterministically (a failing test or a written, repeatable repro) before any fix.
The repro is minimized to the smallest input/code surface that still fails.
At least one falsifiable hypothesis about the cause was stated BEFORE changing production code.
Evidence (instrumentation, logs, a probe) confirmed or refuted each hypothesis — no fixes applied on a guess.
The ROOT cause is named, distinct from the symptom.
A regression test was added that fails before the fix and passes after.
The fix targets the root cause; the minimized repro and the regression test both pass.
fixPrompt: Each iteration advances the diagnosis, it does not jump to a fix. (1) REPRODUCE the failure deterministically. (2) MINIMIZE it to the smallest failing surface. (3) HYPOTHESIZE one falsifiable cause. (4) INSTRUMENT to gather evidence that confirms or refutes it — follow the evidence, do not pattern-match a fix. (5) Once the root cause is proven, add a regression test that fails now, then FIX the root cause and watch it pass. Record per iteration: the hypothesis, the evidence, and the verdict. Converge only when the root cause is named and the regression test passes.
guardrails: No fix is applied before a hypothesis has been confirmed by evidence — guess-fixing is the failure mode this loop exists to prevent.
Fix the root cause, not the symptom; if you cannot name the root cause, you are not ready to fix.
The regression test must be observed to FAIL before the fix, or it does not prove the fix works.
Do not silence the symptom (swallow the error, widen a timeout, add a retry) and call it fixed.
onExhausted: Stop. Report the reproduced failure, the minimized case, the hypotheses tried with the evidence for/against each, the leading remaining hypothesis, and exactly what to instrument next. Do not apply a speculative fix to end the loop.
